title: Label Limit?

posts.author: aw821 (Alicia Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am a photographer and use the LABELS to identify high schools the kids are from then create data based on that column

It seems that labels has a limit how many different label you can have.

Is there a better way besides text field. I like the autopopulation button

Is there a way to increase label limit

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @aw821

From https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360004162179-The-Dropdown-Column#:~:text=To%20select%20multiple%20options%20from,500%20labels%20per%20dropdown%20column. the limit is currently 500 labels.

image873×219 10.5 KB

There is now way of getting around that limit.

posts.author: aw821 (Alicia Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Maybe Labels isn’t what I mean? This type of Button: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fEWPCmPeKrhFrnyYxLrTmxCuPkgPz2Fu/view?usp=share_link

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: YurriMurray (YurriMurray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Alicia Williams:

I am a photographer and use the LABELS to identify Raiderlink high schools the kids are from then create data based on that column

It seems that labels has a limit how many different label you can have.

Is there a better way besides text field. I like the autopopulation button

Is there a way to increase label limit

You should dropdown menus or categorization for efficient school organization. Implement abbreviated codes to reduce character count limitations. Consider database management for flexible data handling. Contact support or check for updates to increase label capacities. Seek software enhancements to streamline data organization through expanded label options.
